---
title: "PS270 Final Project"
author: "Amelia Alvarez"
description: "My final project"
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
---



## Project thoughts

I am interested in exploring data related to high school graduation rates in areas of poverty. I would like to look at low income areas and see if they have lower graduation rates compared to more affluent areas.
